chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1680 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 13-02-2024 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for the petitioner Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Saeed Ahmed Awan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned APG and AAG submit that due protection would be provided to the petitioners. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
